items.name: Rockin' Feline Guitar
items.description: I love every kind of cat. Press 'Z', 'X', 'C', 'V', 'B', 'N' and 'M' to play. When you press 'M', the guitar will make a meow sound.

items.name: Overseer Mage Staff
items.description:
The eye that sees the past, present, and future.
Use it to throw terrible flames at your foes.

items.name: Soccer Ball
items.description: Perfect for kicking around with friends or a real match.

items.name: Lincoln's Golden Rail Splitter
items.description: Split any brick into dozens of pieces!  May or may not actually split bricks.

items.name: Helen The Hiphipapotamus
items.description: Meet Helen, the Hiphipapotamus. Helen is the #1 toy in Robloxia and if you want to find her in a toy store, you better be packing heat to deal with all the other crazy parents trying to buy one.

items.name: Radical Purple Keytar
items.description: Is this keytar totally radical? No duh! Just click to slam out a sick jam like a totally righteous dude.

items.name: Trusty Blade
items.description: This well rounded sword is well suited for blocking daggers, but vulnerable to bigger blades.  Does 35 damage per attack.

items.name: Megaphone
items.description: Yeah! Blah blah blah!  Weeoooo weeeooo! WHHHHHATT?

items.name: 8-Bit Pumpkin Launcher
items.description: It's dangerous to trick or treat alone, take this! Click to lob 8-bits of bursting pumpkins at your foes.

items.name: Frozen Halberd
items.description: A trail of ice follows the halberd's blade as you swing furiously at your enemy. A hit will set the other player on fire and does 40 damage, and encases your foe in ice.

items.name: Red Rolling Hoverboard
items.description: Click to spawn your very own hoverboard! Control your direction using arrow keys or the 'W', 'A', 'S', and 'D' keys. Hit Backspace to dismount.

items.name: Zombie Staff
items.description: ZOMG - Zombies!!  This staff summons 5 zombies to do your bidding.

items.name: ROBLOX U Foam Finger
items.description: Root, root, root for the home team!  Raise your foam finger in victory and high five other fans!

items.name: Portable Justice
items.description: Keep your foes on lockdown!

items.name: Clawknife
items.description: A sword with claws seems a little redundant to me, but whatever.

items.name: Snowy Gravity Coil
items.description: As you walk, leave behind a trail of ice, and as you leap, the north wind gives you a boost the whole way, lifting you high and dropping you gently.

items.name: Pool Noodle
items.description: Swing your pool noodle with all you've got!  Anyone it hits will be pushed back.

items.name: Water Balloon
items.description: Kick off summer right - with a water balloon fight!

items.name: Staff of the Winds
items.description: Try it for free in the ROBLOX Thanksgiving Turkey Hunt! Hold down the left mouse button to unleash a huge gust of wind that will blow away enemies and loose parts alike!

items.name: Trollamon
items.description: This Tiny Trolling Telamon will follow you around and throw his precious fried chicken at your enemies- doing 15 damage per chicken strike.  Justice has never been more savory.
